site.main_title: Cequn Yang | C++ Desktop Software Engineer Resume | Qt/C++ | Germany
site.ats_title: Cequn Yang | ATS Resume | C++ Desktop Software Engineer | Germany

summary: C++ software engineer with 8 years of experience in Windows desktop applications, client products, diagnostics tools, and SDK integration, with work spanning large-scale e-commerce workflows and UAV monitoring platforms, plus growing Qt/QML and Linux exposure for cross-platform roles.

education.subtitle: Bachelor of Engineering in Information Engineering

skills.label: Desktop and UI
skills.value: Windows Desktop Development, MFC, duilib, Qt/QML (entry-level)

skills.label: Core Strengths
skills.value: Desktop Applications, Client Architecture, SDK Integration, Diagnostics Tooling, System Integration, Troubleshooting

bullets.label: Development
bullets.text: Developed and maintained the Windows-based IM chat tool for merchants and consumers using C++17/20 and duilib in a product environment serving millions of merchant devices.

bullets.label: Ownership
bullets.text: Implemented and maintained core client workflows including message sending, synchronization, retraction, message history lookup, reminders, quick reply, and shortcut-based interactions, while supporting daily production troubleshooting.

bullets.label: Integration
bullets.text: Led the replacement of a core client-side data parsing library and maintained Windows-side security, risk-control, and device information collection tooling with lower-level SDK integration.

bullets.label: Development
bullets.text: Developed the desktop client of a UAV monitoring platform from 0 to 1 using C++ and MFC, covering modules, UI improvements, and debugging workflows.

bullets.label: Tooling
bullets.text: Built engineering and production tools with C++, Lua, Python, MFC, and internal SDKs for transmission speed measurement, factory information writing, device status simulation, and automated fault and log troubleshooting.

bullets.label: Platform Extension
bullets.text: Led development of an OCX plugin for an IE-based drone management platform to support real-time video and image display and key-object identification.

highlights: 8 years of C++ desktop and client-side software development
Experience in high-scale merchant-facing software and device-oriented desktop platforms
Strong fit for C++ Software Engineer, Desktop Software Engineer, Qt/C++ Developer, and Device-Platform Engineer roles
